rulings.Case Title: RONNIE CAMERON VS. C.C. MOORE & CO. ENGINEERS
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, March 25, 2013 in Department 503 at 9:30 a.m., Line 1. Defendant Rockwell Automation, Inc.¿s motion for summary judgment and alternate motion for summary adjudication and the order to show cause regarding same are taken off calendar. A dismissal as to defendant is now on file. The court¿s prior tentative ruling granting the motion as unopposed is vacated. = (503/TLJ)
